title: Free energy power amplifier - 2
description: So, I built a little circuit to run this thing and see what kind of performance we could get out of it. It's a simple circuit using a dpdt relay wired as a polarity switch and run from a 555 based astable timer - ignoring the switching which is something i threw together from bits i had around ( I think a H bridge may be the way to go here) the voltage supply to the moving coil is 1.5 and the coil has a resistance of 4.7 ohms - bum - i didn't weigh the coil!! - so it's consuming about 0.32amps. Fairly impressive when you think about it - anyhow hope you enjoy - any questions or suggestions well appreciated - cheers - For anybody interested i have just set up a website - it's new - so not so good - but i'm getting there - the address is https://sites.google.com/site/aferlab/
